name: Morien Resources Corp.
description: Morien Resources Corp. is a Nova Scotia-based mining development company established in 2012. The company focuses on generating shareholder value through a portfolio of royalty interests, primarily including a royalty on coal sales from the Donkin Mine and a royalty on aggregate sales from the Black Point Project, both located in Nova Scotia. Led by a management team committed to disciplined asset and liability management, Morien prioritizes shareholder returns over corporate scale, operating as a publicly traded entity on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol MOX.
